description: Allowlist of known-good spenders on Pharos. A spender on this list is one an Agent can show to the user as 'seen in audited contexts' — NOT a guarantee of safety. Maintainers: add new entries only after manual review of contract source and audit reports.

spenders.name: Null Address (safelist sentinel)
spenders.note: Zero address — used to revoke (set allowance to 0). Not a real spender.

categories.sentinel: Special addresses (zero address, dead address). Not real contracts.

howToSubmit: Open a PR adding {address, name, category, auditUrl, addedDate}. Requires one maintainer review + at least one audit link or a verifiable deployment tx from a known team.
